posts.copy: Start here. The Lingo Legacy OS is live: culture, play, commerce, media, geo-beacons, XP, and Crown drops in one Industrial Noir ecosystem. Enter the hub: https://thelingolegacy.com
That’s My Lingo. Play the Lingo.ai browser prototype, tap for XP, screenshot your score, and tag us for the next Crown drop. Play: https://thelingolegacy.com/site/lingoai/
Meet The Iconic House of Avalon: culture in motion, legacy in formation. Explore programs, archives, houses, and events: https://thelingolegacy.com/site/avalon/
Peaches Keys is unlocking the next play. Follow for spotlights, drops, creator moments, and Lingo Legacy OS missions: https://thelingolegacy.com/site/creators/
